allied_isr_industrial_base.cn: N/A (tracks allied posture relative to US)
allied_isr_industrial_base.notes: ClearSpace (ESA-heritage grappling/proximity hardware) + Shield Space autonomy stack creates an allied co-orbital inspector/interceptor-class capability framed explicitly around adversarial scenarios. Japan moving to select domestic J-LEO D2D vendor — sovereign Pacific comms resilience reduces US SATCOM backstop burden in a Taiwan contingency, but vendor outcome decides whether US industry captures the architecture.
allied_isr_industrial_base.us: Reliant on US commercial imagery providers; NRO expanding BlackSky optical + AI exploitation

autonomous_refueling.cn: Active in-orbit servicing and refueling demonstrations
autonomous_refueling.notes: No new movement this week; prior Quantum Space USSF award stands as the structural shift converting refueling into committed military maneuver-sustainment.
autonomous_refueling.us: Multiple commercial efforts PLUS Pentagon-funded dedicated refueling vehicle (Quantum Space, 2028 delivery)

cislunar_operations.cn: Sustained lunar/cislunar mission investment with latent military utility
cislunar_operations.notes: No movement this week; LM-10B heavy-lift maturation (cislunar-sized payloads) is an adjacent enabler to watch.
cislunar_operations.us: SPACECOM studying offensive cislunar concepts; Quantum Space (Bolden) funds purpose-built HEO/cislunar maneuver craft

counterspace_resilience.cn: Demonstrated counterspace intent; investment in degrading US awareness
counterspace_resilience.notes: Wargame this week surfaced unresolved U.S. escalation thresholds for ambiguous orbital acts (jamming/dazzling/co-orbital maneuver); China deliberately exploits this ambiguity (Shijian proximity ops) to probe below response tripwires. Doctrine gap, not capability gap, is the binding constraint.
counterspace_resilience.us: Jackal autonomous RPO vehicle commissioned (taskable); Space Force rapid-fielding exercise targeting weeks-to-hours deployment

geo_rpo.cn: Demonstrated GEO RPO and towing (SJ-series); classified LM-5 payload a candidate large RPO platform
geo_rpo.notes: Firefly's Space-ng acquisition verticalizes AI visual-navigation/autonomous guidance — core RPO enablers — making it a more credible candidate for classified autonomous-maneuver missions. Watch ITAR/foreign-investor due diligence on the acquired entity.
geo_rpo.us: Operational servicing heritage (MEV-class); multiple uncooperative-target RPO pathfinders maturing (Swift reboost, satellite rescue, Katalyst GEO 2027); Firefly now integrating AI vision-nav in-house

high_power_orbital_platforms.cn: Multiple parallel LEO broadband/D2D programs (Qianfan, Guowang); on-orbit computing buses; Zhuque-2E D2D testing
high_power_orbital_platforms.notes: No movement this week; Boeing 702MP/MUOS extension (see procurement note) reflects continued reliance on large fixed-GEO commercial buses against a maturing Chinese counterspace threat — survivability vs cost/schedule tension persists.
high_power_orbital_platforms.us: Muon Condor-Ultra (Starship-class) bus pitched; K2 Space high-mass-fraction GEO/MEO buses in protected-satcom supply chain

leo_logistics_nodes.notes: No major US/CN station movement this week; allied logistics layer continues thickening (ElevationSpace, Astroscale).
leo_logistics_nodes.us: Commercial station developers courting allied anchor tenants as ISS winds down; Dragon as independent survival node

megaconstellation_deployment.cn: Qianfan past 200 sats; accelerating cadence with multi-launch surges; parallel Guowang build-out
megaconstellation_deployment.notes: Ex-Starlink engineers launching sovereign-constellation venture — Starlink-class operational tradecraft now diffusing to allied/sovereign customers seeking ownership independence from SpaceX. Potential Transporter rideshare pullback would pressure small-sat LEO access pathway. CN booster-reusability progress (see heavy-lift) threatens post-attrition replenishment cost advantage.
megaconstellation_deployment.us: Starlink deployment rate remains the benchmark; Kuiper diversifying onto Ariane 6; SpaceX possibly reconsidering Transporter rideshare

on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.cn: Recoverable capsule heritage; no comparable commercial downmass-for-manufacturing vehicle disclosed
on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.notes: Major US move: Starfall crossed paper-to-flight-proven this week. Flying on Falcon 9 (not awaiting Starship) signals a scalable fleet product. Dual-use as on-orbit inspection/sample-collection/payload-delivery node and a DoD Rocket Cargo / on-orbit retrieval pathway. Concentration risk if SpaceX dominates both launch and reentry.
on_orbit_retrieval_downmass.us: SpaceX Starfall reentry capsule FLIGHT-DEMONSTRATED on Falcon 9 (reentry profile + recovery validated); Dragon downmass operational; broader reentry-startup ecosystem energized

orbital_compute_kill_chain.cn: Beijing erecting coordinating committees/industrial-policy bodies for on-orbit computing capacity
orbital_compute_kill_chain.notes: US edge-compute and shared-bus cybersecurity demos maturing (Space Fabric flight demo, Sophia $7M + 2027 Apex demo). On-orbit edge compute cuts sensor-to-decision latency for ISR/missile-warning/battle-management; co-tenancy cyber hardening relevant to DoD commercial-integration strategy. Watch SBIR/STRATFI follow-on.
orbital_compute_kill_chain.us: Advantage in ground-based processing; NRO funding BlackSky AI exploitation; AFRL/PiLogic seeding on-orbit anomaly-detection sensing layer; SpaceComputer Space Fabric on-orbit cyber demo + Sophia Space 2027 edge-compute demo (Apex bus)

orbital_debris_area_denial.cn: PATTERN confirmed: three rocket upper-stage fragmentations over four years seeding long-lived LEO debris fields; asymmetric remediation incentives
orbital_debris_area_denial.notes: CN reinforced: LeoLabs frames this as systemic (inadequate passivation or indifference to norms), not one-off. Affected regimes overlap commercial broadband megaconstellations and U.S. military recon orbits — functionally a persistent anti-access layer with little Chinese incentive to remediate.
orbital_debris_area_denial.us: Dependent on US commercial SDA + ground tracking; reconstitution-cost exposure in dense LEO belts

orbital_transfer_vehicles.cn: Active but less publicly visible OTV/tug development; pursuing high-power electric/nuclear propulsion
orbital_transfer_vehicles.notes: No new OTV-specific milestone this week; VLEO sustained-propulsion industrial base (see VLEO entry) feeds the same maneuvering supply chain. Delta-v/propellant remains the bottleneck.
orbital_transfer_vehicles.us: Production-scaling (Impulse $500M); multiple commercial OTV providers; NEP demo ~2027; OTVs framed as reconstitution assets

pnt_denial.cn: Counterspace and EW intent; benefits from allied/adversary PNT-denial pressure on US
pnt_denial.notes: No movement this week. Army standing up dedicated space career branch institutionalizes GPS-denied/contested-space integration into land warfare — structural precursor to accelerated procurement and interoperable dual-use demand.
pnt_denial.us: Defending PNT resilience; HASC criticizing GPS management; no disclosed analogous space-based denial capability

quantum_comms_security.cn: Well-funded quantum program positioned to exploit harvested encrypted satellite traffic
quantum_comms_security.notes: New entry. On-orbit satellites with long lifespans cannot easily receive cryptographic upgrades; adversary harvest-now-decrypt-later strategy makes PQC migration timing a genuine vulnerability. Track Pentagon PQC migration timeline against quantum-capability milestones.
quantum_comms_security.us: Slow procurement cycle exposes long-life mil-satcom (GPS, early-warning, nuclear C3 relay) to harvest-now-decrypt-later; constellation-wide PQC migration is a near-term gap

responsive_launch.cn: Demonstrated no-notice maiden flight of reusable LM-12B with operational payloads; commercial booster recovery approaching
responsive_launch.notes: Rocket Lab reinforced US small-sat responsive reconstitution. Chinese commercial booster-landing approach would further compress mass-to-orbit cost and replenishment tempo.
responsive_launch.us: Mature reusable cadence (Falcon 9); Tactically Responsive Space doctrine maturing; USSF exercise validating sub-week fielding; Rocket Lab rapid-response cadence demonstrated

reusable_heavy_lift.cn: Long March 10B reusable-first-stage variant preparing imminent sea-recovery attempt (~July 2025); LM-12B converging on propulsive landing; LandSpace prepping second Zhuque-2 recovery attempt
reusable_heavy_lift.notes: CN moved: LM-10B is sized for large GTO/cislunar payloads — successful first-stage recovery would compress China's cost/cadence gap with SpaceX and enable high-tempo deployment/repositioning of large maneuvering platforms (inspectors, OTVs, co-orbital weapons). Direct erosion of a U.S. asymmetric advantage if recovery succeeds.
reusable_heavy_lift.us: Operational reusable lead (Falcon 9/Heavy); Starship in development; Relativity Terran R second stage in engine testing (2026 target, high schedule risk)

sb_amti_targeting.notes: No movement this week; CN VLEO push (see entry) is an adjacent high-resolution targeting-relevant signal to monitor.
sb_amti_targeting.us: Funded proliferated LEO SB-AMTI layer ($4.16B SpaceX + planned multi-vendor)

space_based_interceptors.cn: No confirmed comparable space-based kinetic interceptor program
space_based_interceptors.notes: No movement this week; overlaps co-orbital attack capability set; slippage likely.
space_based_interceptors.us: Northrop-Apex Golden Dome SBI; 2027 on-orbit demo target

spectrum_orbital_slots.cn: Filed ITU claims for ~200,000 additional satellites ahead of WRC-27
spectrum_orbital_slots.notes: No movement this week; WRC-27 remains the looming legal-encumbrance battleground. ISAM/RPO funding remains government-dependent absent market mechanisms.
spectrum_orbital_slots.us: Lacks comparably aggressive ITU filing posture; exposure to interference claims in a crisis

vleo_persistent_isr.cn: FORMALIZED national VLEO industry alliance; satellites demonstrating sub-300km on-station propulsion endurance; propulsion supply chain attracting capital
vleo_persistent_isr.notes: CN moved from non-lead to active driver. State-coordinated push toward high-resolution, low-revisit persistent ISR may force IC repricing of Chinese tactical-imagery advantage. The sustained-propulsion tech is a prerequisite for co-orbital maneuvering — industrial base transfers directly to RPO/OTV pillars.
vleo_persistent_isr.us: Limited disclosed air-breathing VLEO ISR programs
